privileged_info_summary: The costume_inventory_update task is a LibreOffice Calc-based inventory management simulation with 12 costume items organized in a CSV with columns: Item ID (A), Item Name (B), Type (C), Size (D), Character (E), Status (F), Condition (G), Notes (H). The task requires updating three items (Victorian Jacket at row 6, Medieval Tunic at row 9, Top Hat at row 12) from Checked Out to Available status, marking two items (Victorian Jacket and Medieval Tunic) with Damaged condition and adding damage notes, and applying conditional formatting to the Condition column (G) to highlight damaged items. Success requires achieving a 70% score (3.5 out of 5 criteria): Status Updates Complete (3 items), Damage Marked (2 items), Notes Added with damage keywords, Conditional Formatting Applied, and Data Integrity Maintained (spot-checking rows 2, 4, 13 remain unchanged). The task uses a 180-second timeout with up to 50 steps, medium difficulty, and sparse reward. All data is synthetic, created via setup script.
